name: Beurre Blanc (White Butter Sauce)
recipeIngredient: 1/4 pound unsalted butter, cut in small cubes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the shallots in wine until the wine is reduced by one-fourth.
2. Add the heavy whipping cream and salt, then bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat carefully. Watch it closely as it will boil over quickly.
4. Add the blond roux and whisk well.
5. Whisk in the butter piece by piece until all is incorporated.
6. Add the lemon juice, salt, and white pepper.
7. Keep warm in a bain marie.
